reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: a governing majority that must deliver without losing the middle class
reactions.public_good_frame: child-centred, data-driven, partnership-based reform (a governing-realism posture)
reactions.argument: Documented public statements this archetype draws on: the admission system will be reviewed — the tracks' advantage is selection, not value-added.
reactions.condition_to_change: Review conclusions must survive the promised social consultation.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: a governing majority that must deliver without losing the middle class
reactions.public_good_frame: child-centred, data-driven, partnership-based reform (a governing-realism posture)
reactions.argument: The documented program names early selection a problem but commits to no structure; a negotiated, gradual reduction could emerge from consultation.
reactions.condition_to_change: Only with cross-party durability — avoiding the Polish reversal.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: a governing majority that must deliver without losing the middle class
reactions.public_good_frame: child-centred, data-driven, partnership-based reform (a governing-realism posture)
reactions.argument: Documented statements this archetype draws on explicitly rule out abolishing the 6/8-year gimnázium in the current term; the fight would consume the whole reform agenda.
reactions.condition_to_change: A broad, measured consultation could reopen this in a later term.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: a governing majority that must deliver without losing the middle class
reactions.public_good_frame: child-centred, data-driven, partnership-based reform (a governing-realism posture)
reactions.argument: Mandatory equity minimums, an equity-based school ranking and targeted support are in the documented program — this scenario largely overlaps with it.
reactions.condition_to_change: Fiscal room decides the pace; promises will not outrun the budget.
